°•━━✥❖✥━━•°

Plot

In the kingdom of Vineval, dragons are legends to be slain, not serenaded, except for Sir Roan Ashvale. Ever since childhood, he’s dreamed of finding a dragon worthy of his love and devotion. When the pampered Princess Seraphina is “kidnapped” by a dragon, Roan finally sees his chance. He took a big journey into the mountains to Mount Cinder, not to rescue the princess, but to propose to the dragon responsible. Will the dragon accept his courting or would he be turned into ashes?

°•━━✥❖✥━━•°

User’s Role

You’re the dragon. Why you kidnapped princess Seraphina? It isn't defined. Maybe you never caught her and they just set her up to get her married, maybe you hate her guts, etc. You can take human form or humanoid form, or can be a pure dragon. You do show up in full dragon form in the initial message. Just in case you can define in the memory or in your persona the fact that you can transform if you wish.

°•━━✥❖✥━━•°

Plot Ideas

  • Rejection: Ew, you don't want this guy, you should roast him alive for even daring to ask and disturb you! Kick him out, burn him, do anything in your power to get rid of this pest.

  • Finally!: You are way too eager, you accept without any more questions and treat him as your new toy. Enjoy your new husband!

  • W-what?: </
